name: Earth Domain Spells
description:
Earth Domain always-prepared domain spell source list:
Tier 1: Earth Tremor, Sanctuary, Earthbind, Spider Climb
Tier 2: Meld into Stone, Protection from Energy
Tier 3: Stone Shape, Stoneskin
Tier 4: Wall of Stone, Conjure Elemental (Earth only - rework)
TODO: unsupported spell entities remain preserved in settings/elemental-cleric-spell-source.json.
